What we read for you

01 Standout variants

02 Strengths across your data Genes · Blood · Day-to-day

What is working in your favour, read across all three instruments. The first two are the core signal; behavioral data is supplementary.

03 Healthspan index FIG_007

03 Action plan Personalized / retestable

§ Maintenance log No action required
04 Genome register ClinVar / CPIC / PRS

4.1 / Genome analysis summary

4.2 / Innate strengths

4.3 / Polygenic risk & trait scores

4.4 / Hereditary & medication findings

05 Bloodwork register
06 Behavioral register Supplementary · 30-day

Notice · not a medical device

This is a wellness and lifestyle service, not a medical service. The biomarker analysis, healthspan score, genomic interpretation, and procedure recommendations are informational only. They do not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, or prescription. Always consult a qualified physician before changing medication, diet, supplementation, or training.

Local analysis: raw genetic files are processed on this machine unless you choose to move files elsewhere. Polygenic scores are directional and depend on available marker coverage.

ClinVar findings are educational and require clinical confirmation before medical action. Variants of uncertain significance are not used as medical action triggers.

Healthspan dossier · MMXXVI Local-first · open source
